title: Cockpit Countdown
lore: Commute music as pre-flight checklist — every synth stab is another system green.
artistPersona: Mecha-anime score producer — every build-up is a launch sequence, every choir hit is a cockpit declaration. Instrumental-first; no licensed robot likeness.
albumConcept: Sawa Node's hangar debut — blueprint strings, taiko pulse, and launch-sequence builds that never leave the cockpit.
